etymology.description: 白(白) (bái, "white") + 放(放) (fàng, "to release") -> original meaning "to shine" -> later used phonetically in 皦 ("urge, encourage")
etymology.interpretation: The character combines 白(白) (bái, "white"), symbolizing brightness or light, with 放(放) (fàng, "to release"), indicating dispersal or spreading of light, to depict a bright or shining concept. This was then borrowed phonetically to convey the sense "urge, encourage," possibly linked to the idea of inspiring or illuminating prospects.
